MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DAVID STURMAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar. The case was dismissed November 2, 2017.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)

Sturman'S Motion To File Under Seal
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DAVID STURMAN'S Motion To File Under Seal is GRANTED. The motion complies with CRC 2.550 et seq. and there is no opposition on file. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that specifies by title each document to be filed under seal.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
